ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seeds" (
  "seed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seed sample */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the seed sample */,
  "perimeter" REAL /* Perimeter of the seed sample */,
  "compactness" REAL /* Compactness of the seed sample */,
  "length_of_kernel" REAL /* Length of the kernel in the seed sample */,
  "width_of_kernel" REAL /* Width of the kernel in the seed sample */,
  "asymmetry_coefficient" REAL /* Asymmetry coefficient of the seed sample */,
  "length_of_kernel_groove" REAL /* Length of the kernel groove in the seed sample */,
  "seed_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the seed (e.g., variety classification) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date of seed collection */,
  "sample_source" TEXT /* Source of the seed sample (e.g., farm, nursery) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the seed collection location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the seed collection location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the seed collection location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seeds_seed_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("seed_type_id") REFERENCES seed_types ("seed_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seed_types" (
  "seed_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seed type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the seed type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the seed type */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the seed type */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the seed type */,
  "variety" TEXT /* Variety of the seed type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seed_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher (e.g., university, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher for the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seed_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "seed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seed sample being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis (e.g., quality rating) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seed_analysis_seed_id FOREIGN KEY ("seed_id") REFERENCES seeds ("seed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seed_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "seed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seed sample in the image */,
  "image_date" TEXT /* Date the image was taken */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seed_images_seed_id FOREIGN KEY ("seed_id") REFERENCES seeds ("seed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seed_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "seed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seed sample */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., protein content) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seed_metrics_seed_id FOREIGN KEY ("seed_id") REFERENCES seeds ("seed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "seed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seed sample */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the experiment environment */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity of the experiment environment */,
  "light_intensity" REAL /* Light intensity of the experiment environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_conditions_seed_id FOREIGN KEY ("seed_id") REFERENCES seeds ("seed_id")
)
